channel.title: Ghost Alpha Dossier — Daily Market Intelligence
channel.description: AI-powered daily market analysis with institutional-grade signals, momentum picks, and Sam's commentary. Generated by a 16-stage pipeline. Built by Michael. Roasted by Sam.

item.title: 🟡 Dossier 2026-05-29 — NORMAL · Gold: GOOG
item.description:
🟡 NORMAL · SPY ▲ 0.6% · VIX 15.8

**Regime check:** VIX at 15.

🥇 Gold Pick: GOOG — Score: 49/100 (A)

📡 173 scanner signals across 6 strategies

"God, grant me the serenity to accept the trades I cannot change, the courage to cut the ones I can, and the wisdom to know the difference." — Sam
